title: onobrychis ebenoides
intro: Onobrychis ebenoides, also known as the asperula-like sainfoin or asperula, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Onobrychis ebenoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Onobrychis ebenoides can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is also used in herbal teas and decoctions.
